---
title: "The psychometrics of rating facial attractiveness using different response scales"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Ritchie, K. L., Flack, T. R., Mireku, M. O., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2024
date: 2024-01-01
pub-journal: "Perception"
volume: "1–16"
doi: "10.1177/03010066241256221"
pdf: "assets/papers/2024/krameretal2024.pdf"
categories: [attractiveness, methodology]
---
